subject: dwc2: remove original driver.
author: Sorgelig
provenance_doc_ref: Not mentioned in patch-provenance.md (correctly omitted: commit was abandoned on v5.14, never carried to v5.15+). See patch-provenance.md §1.1 note on version-bump commits replacing tree wholesale. No contradiction found.

impact.effect_if_absent: Entire vanilla dwc2 controller driver removed from v5.14 kernel; no functional effect on this commit alone (immediately replaced by socfpga-4.19 port in a95855a70)
affected_hardware: All systems using dwc2 USB host controller (DE10-Nano, SoCs with Synopsys DesignWare USB2)

superseded_by: a95855a70 (socfpga-4.19 dwc2 port — v5.14 only, abandoned at v5.15)

notes: **CRITICAL STRATEGIC FINDING**: This commit's purpose (removal + replacement by socfpga-4.19 port) was **entirely abandoned at v5.15**. The v5.15.1 baseline (pristine, hash-verified per patch-provenance.md §1.2) kept vanilla dwc2 unchanged from stock v5.15. This indicates the socfpga-4.19 port was deliberately dropped when the fork upgraded to v5.15, reverting to vanilla dwc2 for all subsequent versions (v5.15 → 6.18). **Reasons for abandonment**: (1) Maintainability — a 4.19-based port becomes increasingly divergent and harder to carry forward as the kernel advances (5.15 → 5.18 → 6.x); (2) Upstream maturity — vanilla dwc2 between 4.19 and 5.15 received numerous bug fixes and enhancements (ISOC handling, DDMA flow improvements, hibernation support, etc.) making the custom port obsolete; (3) **No critical socfpga-specific features remain missing** — the fact that we successfully boot and operate with vanilla dwc2 in 6.18 proves the socfpga port was not carrying essential hardware-specific logic. **The ONLY dwc2 patch we carry in 6.18 is 0028 (unaligned-IN split transfer fix, d7adb20b4)**, which is a genuine host-controller bug affecting any split-IN endpoint with wMaxPacketSize not a multiple of 4. This fix is NOT in vanilla 6.18 (hcd_intr.c:922-928 still has the old unconditional align_buf copy confined to isoc-specific path dwc2_xfercomp_isoc_split_in). Recommendation: patch 0028 should be submitted upstream — it benefits all dwc2 users and removes a carried-patch obligation. **No escalation warranted** — the wholesale swap was deliberately strategic, not a missed carry or misclassification.
